description: A document, that can be parsed, printed, download or displayed. This has intentionally been kept separate from MediaFile as they may contain additional attributes like signature, schema etc.
title: Document

label.description: The display name of the media file

mimeType.description: MIME type if 'data' is provided (application/pdf, image/png, application/json).

standard.description: Describes the schema type in case the document follows a standard schema like a verifiableCredential
